revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:4 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:4月23日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 4월 23일]][[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:四月廿三]][[zh:四月廿三]]
{{Not to be confused with|April 23|qq=April 23}} <!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=四月廿三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 4월 23일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar April|qq=}} '''April 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|April (Lunisolar)|ja|4月 (旧暦)|lt=April (Uzuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/April (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 4th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} . == Events == * {{ill|Kannin|en|Kannin|qid=Q1193951|lt=Kannin|1=Kannin}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1017|en|1017|qid=Q19249|lt=1017|1=1017}} {{ill|May 21|en|May 21|qid=Q2580|lt=May 21|1=May 21}} ) – The era was changed from {{ill|Chōwa|en|Chōwa|qid=Q1194173|lt=Chōwa|1=Chōwa}} to {{ill|Kannin|en|Kannin|qid=Q1193951|lt=Kannin|1=Kannin}} . * {{ill|Kōei|en|Kōei|qid=Q980266|lt=Kōei|1=Kōei}} 1st Year / {{ill|Kōkoku|en|Kōkoku|qid=Q1143592|lt=Kōkoku|1=Kōkoku}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1342|en|1342|qid=Q6069|lt=1342|1=1342}} {{ill|May 28|en|May 28|qid=Q2588|lt=May 28|1=May 28}} ) – The {{ill|Muromachi Shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|1=Ashikaga shogunate|2=ja|3=室町幕府|lt=Muromachi Shogunate|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muromachi Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1154406}} established a Ranking system for Zen temples by designating the {{ill|Five Mountains and Ten Temples|ja|五山十刹|lt=Five Mountains and Ten Temples|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Mountains and Ten Temples|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 寺格|1=temple rank|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11457930}} . * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|1=Genki (era)|2=ja|3=元亀|qid=Q1145064|lt=Genki Era|Genki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1145064}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1570|en|1570|qid=Q6659|lt=1570|1=1570}} {{ill|May 27|en|May 27|qid=Q2587|lt=May 27|1=May 27}} ) – The era was changed from {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|qid=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} to {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|1=Genki (era)|2=ja|3=元亀|qid=Q1145064|lt=Genki Era|Genki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1145064}} . * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1858|en|1858|qid=Q7684|lt=1858|1=1858}} {{ill|June 4|en|June 4|qid=Q2627|lt=June 4|1=June 4}} ) – {{ill|Ii Naosuke|en|Ii Naosuke|qid=Q716940|lt=Ii Naosuke|1=Ii Naosuke}} , lord of the {{ill|Hikone Domain|en|Hikone Domain|qid=Q1062225|lt=Hikone Domain|1=Hikone Domain}} , assumed the position of {{ill|Tairō|en|Tairō|qid=Q956844|lt=Grand Elder|1=Tairō}} of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|lt=Edo Shogunate|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1862|en|1862|qid=Q7698|lt=1862|1=1862}} {{ill|May 21|en|May 21|qid=Q2580|lt=May 21|1=May 21}} ) – The {{ill|Teradaya Incident|ja|寺田屋騒動|lt=Teradaya Incident|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teradaya Incident|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 寺田屋事件|1=Teradaya incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q109120898}} : Under orders from the lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|en|Satsuma Domain|qid=Q676187|lt=Satsuma Domain|1=Satsuma Domain}} , {{ill|Arima Shinshichi|ja|有馬新七|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Arima Shinshichi|1=Shinshichi Arima|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11516790}} and others were executed at a ship inn in Fushimi. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1870|en|1870|qid=Q7741|lt=1870|1=1870}} {{ill|May 23|en|May 23|qid=Q2583|lt=May 23|1=May 23}} ) – The Meiji government issued its first foreign bond in London to finance railway construction. == Births == * {{ill|Bun'ei|en|Bun'ei|qid=Q1010103|lt=Bun'ei|1=Bun'ei}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1265|en|1265|qid=Q5516|lt=1265|1=1265}} {{ill|May 10|en|May 10|qid=Q2557|lt=May 10|1=May 10}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Fushimi|en|Emperor Fushimi|qid=Q373949|lt=Emperor Fushimi|1=Emperor Fushimi}} , the 92nd Emperor (died {{ill|1317|en|1317|qid=Q5745|lt=1317|1=1317}} ). * {{ill|Tenmon|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 21st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1552|en|1552|qid=Q6565|lt=1552|1=1552}} {{ill|May 16|en|May 16|qid=Q2574|lt=May 16|1=May 16}} ) – [[:en:Prince Masahito|Prince Makihito]] , the first son of {{ill|Emperor Ōgimachi|en|Emperor Ōgimachi|qid=Q334076|lt=Emperor Shōchō|1=Emperor Ōgimachi}} (died {{ill|1586|en|1586|qid=Q6739|lt=1586|1=1586}} ). * {{ill|Kōka|en|Kōka|qid=Q1325317|lt=Kōka|1=Kōka}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1847|en|1847|qid=Q7644|lt=1847|1=1847}} {{ill|June 6|en|June 6|qid=Q2620|lt=June 6|1=June 6}} ) – {{ill|Nakai Shōgorō|ja|中井庄五郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakai Shōgorō|1=Nakai Shōgorō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11362915}} , a loyalist of the Bakumatsu period (died {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|en|1865|qid=Q7708|lt=1865|1=1865}} {{ill|May 17|en|May 17|qid=Q2575|lt=May 17|1=May 17}} ) – {{ill|Sawayanagi Seitarō|ja|沢柳政太郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sawayanagi Seitarō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 澤柳政太郎|1=Masataro Sawayanagi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11565929}} , a bureaucrat in the Ministry of Education and an educator (died {{ill|1927|en|1927|qid=Q18110|lt=1927|1=1927}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Shohei|ja|初平|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shohei|1=Chuping|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q8011644}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|192|en|192|qid=Q30336|lt=192|1=192}} {{ill|May 22|en|May 22|qid=Q2581|lt=May 22|1=May 22}} ) – {{ill|Dong Zhuo|en|Dong Zhuo|qid=Q334081|lt=Dong Zhuo|1=Dong Zhuo}} , a military commander at the end of the Later Han Dynasty (born {{ill|AD 139|en|AD 139|qid=Q31319|lt=139|1=AD 139}} ?). * {{ill|Kan'en|en|Kan'en|qid=Q1145723|lt=Kannen|1=Kan'en}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1750|en|1750|qid=Q7611|lt=1750|1=1750}} {{ill|May 27|en|May 27|qid=Q2587|lt=May 27|1=May 27}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Sakuramachi|en|Emperor Sakuramachi|qid=Q313870|lt=Emperor Sakuramachi|1=Emperor Sakuramachi}} , the 115th Emperor (died {{ill|1720|en|1720|qid=Q6908|lt=1720|1=1720}} ). * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1862|en|1862|qid=Q7698|lt=1862|1=1862}} {{ill|May 21|en|May 21|qid=Q2580|lt=May 21|1=May 21}} ) – {{ill|Arima Shinshichi|ja|有馬新七|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Arima Shinshichi|1=Shinshichi Arima|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11516790}} , a pro-sonnō jōi activist (died {{ill|1825|en|1825|qid=Q6997|lt=1825|1=1825}} ).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|4|22|4|24|3|23|5|4|0423|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ar:April 23 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:四月廿三]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:四月廿三]]
